title: Really HOT Torches
body:
# Really HOT Torches

🔥 Attack with torches and set your enemies ablaze! 🔥

# 📜 Description
This datapack adds a special mechanic to Minecraft: when you hit any mob with a torch, it will instantly catch fire, just like wielding a magical flaming torch! 🔥

# ⚔️ Features
Hitting a mob with a torch sets it on fire for a few seconds.
No need for Fire Aspect enchantments.
Works in Survival and Multiplayer.
Easy to install and use.

![Burn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/383f15e4b7182350c106a81ea4b591313dd38a16.gif)



# 🛠️ Installation
1. Download the datapack and place it in:
```
.minecraft/saves/[YourWorld]/datapacks/
```
2. Use the command /reload in the world.
3. Hit any mob with a torch and watch it burn! 🔥



# ⚠️ Warning
### 🔥 Be careful not to burn yourself! 🔥
